task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new workflow named 'Project_Initiation_WF'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere Workflow window should display a saved record with the Name field set to 'Project_Initiation_WF'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workflow is associated with the 'C_Project' table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Workflow configuration window, the 'Table' field should be set to 'C_Project' (or 'Project' if displaying the translated name).

task_completion.description: Verify exactly three nodes are created: 'WF_Start', 'WF_Review', and 'WF_Approved'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Workflow Node tab or list view should show exactly three node records with the names 'WF_Start', 'WF_Review', and 'WF_Approved' (case-insensitive).

task_completion.description: Verify 'WF_Start' is configured as the Start Node of the workflow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'WF_Start' node should be selected in the 'Node' (Start Node) field on the main Workflow tab, or the 'Start' checkbox should be checked specifically for the 'WF_Start' node.

task_completion.description: Verify a transition is configured from 'WF_Start' to 'WF_Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Node Transition tab for 'WF_Start' should show a 'Next Node' transition pointing to 'WF_Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify a transition is configured from 'WF_Review' to 'WF_Approved'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Node Transition tab for 'WF_Review' should show a 'Next Node' transition pointing to 'WF_Approved'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the workflow.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface with standard menus, tabs, and fields, rather than terminal commands or direct SQL database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the functional iDempiere ERP system, not a text editor, mock-up, or static image.

integrity.description: Verify the workflow records were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard iDempiere save confirmation messages (e.g., 'Record saved' status bar updates) or the records appearing in a persistent list view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct table name for the Project table is 'C_Project' (verified via iDempiere official documentation). Node names are case-insensitive.
